data.body: Ported in 6344ca28: link_core/link_cli delegate to the shared rebar.graph add_dependency (same fn bash calls via ticket-graph.py) — promotion/REDIRECT/cycle/redundant all structural. --dry-run still via ticket-link.sh. Dual-run green bash AND python on link (66), discovered-from (4), duplicates-supersedes (23), python-push (2) + library parity tests. Default stays bash.
